dungeon: GENUINE ROTF realm + multi-dungeon run by VoltiPlay (the SERVER OWNER — same handle as the God of Amber Stones owner-showcase tag disc_CnZQkLsjBVI; Level 20 Wizard, death screen 'killed on January 12, 2019 by RockBomb'). Chat readable. HIGH-value boss-taunt yield: TWO custom bosses with full short taunt sets — Queen of Hearts (Wonderland) and Bedlam - God of Chaos (Court of Oryx) — plus Avatar of the Forgotten King, a 'Wizzard Clone', Shaitan the Advisor, and a batch of Oryx realm-announcer lines.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-minimaps+frames (realm + several dungeon arenas): (1) green grass REALM with a structured DARK-PURPLE inner throne ROOM (Wonderland / Queen of Hearts arena); (2) an ORANGE/LAVA arena marked with a TEMPLE/altar icon (Belladonna's Garden / Shaitan); (3) a tan-brown boss arena with FOUR orange BRAZIER/pillar nodes arranged around a dark-red centre + a blue/grey L-corridor room (Court of Oryx, where Bedlam - God of Chaos is summoned via 'Miru is quaking you to Court of Oryx!'); (4) grey brick dungeon corridors + a RED-LAVA combat arena. Realm-hub compilation -> arenas catalogued individually.

bosses.name: Queen of Hearts
phases: PHASE 1: summons Guards ('Guards, kill these troublemakers!'); PHASE 2: dismisses them and fights solo ('My guards that is enough, I'll do it alone!'); near-death: pleads for guard protection ('if I die, Wonderland will [fall]')
attacks: DOCUMENTED-phase-behavior-from-taunts (geometry not isolated -> approximate): summon-adds (Guards) in phase 1, then direct fire in phase 2. Reconstruct as: Spawn Guards + periodic shots (p1) -> heavier radial/aimed fire with no adds (p2).
taunts: My guards that is enough, I'll do it alone!
Guard protect me, if I die, Wonderland will [fall]
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (orange boss-coloured 'Queen of Hearts', lines clear; the third line right-edge cut at 'Wonderland will...'). WONDERLAND is a ROTF-CUSTOM dungeon (no base-RotMG Queen of Hearts) -> NEW build candidate. The summon->solo->plead arc is a clean 3-phase design straight from the taunts. Owner-played = high confidence it exists.

bosses.name: Bedlam - God of Chaos
phases: chaos-themed; 'Bring forth... THE CHAOS!' as an escalation/summon beat
attacks: not geometrically isolated (edited, no bossend) -> reconstruct as chaotic multi-pattern (mixed radial nova + scattered) fitting the 'Chaos' theme; DOCUMENTED only that it is a Court-of-Oryx summoned boss.
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (orange boss-coloured 'Bedlam - God of Chaos', exact incl. the dash and the quoted 'ALL'). Summoned in the COURT OF ORYX ('Miru is quaking you to Court of Oryx!'). NOT a base Court-of-Oryx boss -> ROTF-CUSTOM NEW build candidate. Owner-played.

bosses.name: Avatar of the Forgotten King
taunts: YOU KNOW NOT WHAT YOU HAVE [done/unleashed]
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (orange boss-coloured). Avatar of the Forgotten King is BASE-GAME (Lost Halls) -> ENRICH base if these lines differ from canon; second line right-edge cut. Verify against base before treating as custom.

bosses.name: Wizzard Clone
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (orange boss-coloured 'Wizzard Clone', sic spelling). SAME 'I am everywhere and nowhere!' line as the verified Crystal Prisoner Clone -> CROSS-CORROBORATES that this is a SHARED ROTF clone-boss taunt used by multiple clone enemies. Already in build for Crystal Prisoner Clone; note the shared usage.

bosses.name: Shaitan the Advisor
taunts: THE MAD GOD SHALL KNOW OF THESE TR[ANSGRESSIONS]
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (orange; 'Belladonna's Garden opened by 7live'). Shaitan = BASE-GAME (Lair of Shaitan / Belladonna's Garden) -> base content; line right-edge cut. Recorded for completeness, low new value.

bosses.name: Oryx the Mad God (realm announcer)
taunts: YOU WILL NOT LIVE TO SEE THE LIGHT OF [DAY]
Krond, you may have destroyed my Cube God, but you will never defeat me!
At last, a Grand Sphinx will teach you to res[pect]
Mythical has unleashed an evil upon this R[ealm]
My Hermit God's thousand tentacles shall [drag you...]
My last Phoenix Lord will blacken your bon[es]
Tokularnik, you pathetic swine! How dare [you]
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (orange 'Oryx the Mad God:' realm-invasion announcer). HONESTY FLAG: most of these are likely CANONICAL base-game RotMG Oryx realm taunts (they name standard guardians — Cube God, Grand Sphinx, Hermit God, Phoenix Lord — and address players by name) and OVERLAP the previous tag disc_ehEBWCzq3fs -> recorded verbatim but NOT claimed as ROTF-original. 'I HAVE CLOSED THIS REALM!' = base realm-close line. Do not build as custom without checking base Oryx taunt list.

event_bosses_seen_in_global_feed: Court of Oryx summon ('Miru is quaking you to Court of Oryx!')
mechanics: DOCUMENTED: an OWNER (VoltiPlay) realm + multi-dungeon run -> high-trust that the captured bosses are live server content. HEADLINE = two ROTF-CUSTOM bosses with verbatim taunt sets: Queen of Hearts (Wonderland; a clean 3-phase summon->solo->plead arc) and Bedlam - God of Chaos (a custom COURT OF ORYX boss). Plus a 'Wizzard Clone' sharing the verified 'I am everywhere and nowhere!' clone line (confirming it is a shared clone-boss taunt), base-game Avatar of the Forgotten King ('BURN!!') and Shaitan the Advisor. A large batch of Oryx realm-announcer lines is recorded but FLAGGED as probably-canonical (overlaps the prior tag) to avoid over-claiming. No clean boss bullet-geometry (edited, no bossends) -> attacks approximate/reconstructed.
uncertain: No bossends + edited compilation -> attack GEOMETRY is reconstructed, not traced (Queen of Hearts phases inferred from her taunts; Bedlam pattern only theme-reconstructed). Several lines right-edge cut (Queen of Hearts '...Wonderland will [fall]', Avatar '...YOU KNOW NOT WHAT YOU HAVE', Shaitan '...TR[ANSGRESSIONS]', some Oryx lines). The Oryx announcer batch is probably base-game canon, NOT ROTF-original (flagged). Avatar of the Forgotten King + Shaitan are base-game (enrich, don't duplicate). Wonderland/Court arena shapes from minimaps only.
confidence: HIGH for the existence + verbatim short taunts of the two NEW custom bosses (Queen of Hearts, Bedlam - God of Chaos) — owner-played, boss-coloured, clearly read. MEDIUM for line completions (some cut) and the Queen of Hearts phase reconstruction (from taunts, not geometry). Oryx lines deliberately NOT claimed as custom. GENUINE ROTF. Net value: 2 strong NEW custom build candidates (Queen of Hearts w/ a ready 3-phase design + Wonderland dungeon; Bedlam - God of Chaos for Court of Oryx) + cross-corroboration of the shared clone taunt. Best follow-up: a single Wonderland clip to complete the Queen of Hearts lines + capture her actual attack geometry.
